reviews.review_description: Hi I would really want too be a moderator it's my dream and I follow the rules (kinda) but I am not racist and I'm a girl. But I'm pretty sure that it doesn't matter, it matters about the personality and good people you know. I just gotten the game. But I don't think I can get moderator anyway but imma check the game out. It looks nice on pictures and the thumbnail. But if I can't be moderator it's ok.
Bro I met a mod and we had fun I subed to him his name was jayxz and I subbed but he was awsome thanks bro

Hello, I am Luckmonk, I am an admin for this game (community manager in the discord) and love this game so much. There is such an awesome community both in discord and in game, with a lot of maps which are all super fun to play. One thing a lot of games like this don’t have, private codes. You can join any code with your friend and do whatever you want! (please don’t break the game) That concludes my review on this awesome game, make sure you download this game, and you might see me in sometimes! Have an amazing day. :)
